title: HTTP Request Routing and Dispatch
interaction_flow: Client → ProxyHttpServer: HTTP request (method, url, body)
ProxyHttpServer._handleRequest: construct URL + routeKey = `${req.method} ${url.pathname}`
ProxyHttpServer._handleRequest → ProxyHttpServer._matchRoute(req.method, url.pathname)
_matchRoute: iterate this.routes entries; split pattern into [routeMethod, routePath]
_matchRoute → matchPath(routePath, pathname): compare path segments, extract :param tokens → returns params{} or null
_matchRoute → _handleRequest: returns { handler, params } or null
alt no match: ProxyHttpServer → Client: sendJson(res, 404, { error:'Not found', path })
alt POST|PUT: ProxyHttpServer → parseBody(req): buffer chunks, JSON.parse → returns body{}
ProxyHttpServer: extract query = Object.fromEntries(url.searchParams)
ProxyHttpServer → RouteHandler: await handler({ body, query, params })
RouteHandler (mailbox routes) → store.send / store.poll / store.ack / store.list / store.getById
RouteHandler (asset routes) → proxyHandlers.assetValidate / assetFetch / assetSearch OR store.send
RouteHandler (task routes) → taskMonitor.subscribe / unsubscribe / recordClaim / recordComplete / getMetrics OR store.send / store.poll
RouteHandler (dm routes) → dmHandler.send / poll / list OR store.send / store.poll / store.list

RouteHandler (session routes) → sessionHandler.createSession / joinSession / leaveSession / sendMessage / delegateSubtask / submitResult / pollInvites / listActiveSessions OR store.send / store.poll / store.list
RouteHandler (proxy system routes) → store.countPending / store.getState / getHubMailboxStatus()
RouteHandler → ProxyHttpServer: returns { status?, body } result
ProxyHttpServer → sendJson(res, result.status || 200, result.body || result)
sendJson → Client: HTTP response (JSON payload, Content-Type, Content-Length)
alt error thrown: ProxyHttpServer → sendJson(res, err.statusCode || 500, { error: err.message })
key_relationships: buildRoutes depends_on extensions: dmHandler, sessionHandler, skillUpdater, getHubMailboxStatus

method_signatures.ProxyHttpServer._matchRoute: _matchRoute(method: string, pathname: string) → { handler, params } | null
method_signatures.matchPath: matchPath(pattern: string, pathname: string) → params{} | null
method_signatures.sendJson: sendJson(res, status: number, body: object) → void

important_notes: Routes are plain key→async-fn map: key = 'METHOD /path/:param'. Pattern matching is exact segment count; :param segments capture values. Extensions (dmHandler, sessionHandler, taskMonitor) are optional — routes fall back to raw store operations when absent. Port scans from DEFAULT_PORT (19820) up to 100 attempts on EADDRINUSE. Server writes its URL/PID to settings file on successful bind.
